name: android-sdk-build-tools-common
title: android-sdk-build-tools-common
summary: Tools for building Android applications - Common files
description:
Tools for building Android applications - Common files
The Android SDK includes a variety of tools that help you develop mobile
applications for the Android platform. The tools are classified into 3 groups:
SDK Tools, Platform-tools and Build-tools.
.
Build-tools is a component of the Android SDK required for building Android
application code.
.
This package provides common files of Android SDK Build-tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-sdk-build-tools-common because Tools for building Android applications - Common files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-sdk-build-tools-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-sdk-build-tools-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-sdk-build-tools-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
